dashboard.subtitle: Track and manage your job applications in one place

empty.title: No applications yet
empty.description: Start tracking your job applications by adding your first one.

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to track your job applications
auth.loginSuccess: Welcome back! You are signed in.
auth.heroDescription: Never lose track of where you applied. Organize, manage, and succeed in your job search.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: We will email you a reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: Reset link sent. Check your inbox.
auth.resetMissingSession: Your reset link is missing or expired. Please request a new one.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for confirmation link
auth.previewTitle: Tame the chaos of your job search
auth.previewDesc: Stop drowning in spreadsheets and scattered notes. Organize, track,and manage all your job applications in one professional dashboard.

hero.pill: Built for the messy job hunt
hero.subtitle: Track every application, follow up on time, and see what's actually working. Free, forever.

preview.pill: Three views, one source of truth
preview.title: Track the pipeline. See the funnel. Find what's working.

compare.title: JobTrack vs. that spreadsheet
compare.subtitle: You know the one. It started so well.

find.need: Find applications I sent in March

capture.title: A job, in 30 seconds.
capture.body: Paste a job URL, drop a quick note, or type Company → Role. We fill in the rest — and you can always add detail later.

see.title: Your funnel, finally legible.
see.body: Watch where applications stall. Compare sources. Spot the patterns spreadsheets bury under conditional formatting.

followUp.title: Don't ghost the ones that mattered.
followUp.body: Stale applications surface themselves. Set a follow-up date when the moment is fresh; we remind you when it isn't.

mocks.staleReminder: We'll nudge you on Thursday so this doesn't slip again.

free.a: Yes, forever. No trial, no surprise tier, no upsells. If we ever add paid features they'll be additive — your existing tracking will always work.

data.a: Supabase, hosted in the EU. You can export everything to CSV or JSON anytime, and deleting your account wipes it for real.

import.q: Can I import from a spreadsheet?
import.a: CSV import is here. Notion and Google Sheets paste-in is on the roadmap — you can also forward a job listing email to your inbox once we ship that.

mobile.a: Yes — full mobile, installable as a PWA. Native apps are not on the near roadmap; the web app does what you need.

email.a: Zero. The only mail you'll get is follow-up reminders you opted into and the weekly summary you can disable.

delete.a: Anytime, from Settings → Data. Deleting wipes your applications, notes, and settings for real.

finalCta.pill: Built by job seekers, for job seekers
finalCta.title: Ready when you are.
finalCta.subtitle: Sign up takes 30 seconds. Tracking your first application takes another 20.

footer.tagline: Your job hunt's command center. Free, forever.

quotes.quote: I went from 'Excel chaos' to 'I know exactly what's pending' in one evening.
quotes.name: Maya P.

quotes.quote: The funnel view made me realize cold applications were a waste. Pivoted to referrals — got 3 offers.
quotes.name: Diego R.

quotes.quote: Stale reminders alone saved two interview rounds I would have ghosted.
quotes.name: Jules T.
